name: Field Medic
description: The pragmatic healer of the trenches. Heavy leather apron, vials of chemical compounds, a syringe launcher that fires healing payloads or toxic rounds. They keep soldiers alive through grit and chemistry — not magic.

abilities.name: Hemostatic Jab
abilities.description: A precise injection that halts bleeding — or induces it in enemies. Deals damage with a chance to cause bleeding.

abilities.name: Field Sutures
abilities.description: Rapid battlefield stitching. Crude, effective, and done while bullets fly. Restores 25 HP.

abilities.name: Adrenaline Injection
abilities.description: A combat stimulant that floods the system with fight-or-flight chemicals. Increases attack power for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Surgical Strike
abilities.description: A precisely targeted injection to a vulnerable nerve cluster. The medic's most devastating attack.
